tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def filtered-prs (filter (fn [pr] (and (> (:additions pr) 400) (not (:closes_linear pr)))) all-prs))

(def repo-groups (group-by :repo filtered-prs))

(def counts-by-repo (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)]) repo-groups))

(def total-count (count filtered-prs))

(def most-additions-pr (apply max-key :additions f…(+130)
